title: Reorder Cards in Cards Widget on dashboard
excerpt: When creating a dashboard and using the Cards widget, I cannot reorder how the items appear.  The first card that appears is not always the one I want to appear first.  Is there a way to allow for reordering, even if its…

posts.author: nh44s (Noah Haas)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a dashboard and using the Cards widget, I cannot reorder how the items appear. The first card that appears is not always the one I want to appear first. Is there a way to allow for reordering, even if its through reordering the items on the backend board that is feeding the dashboard?
